# Statuses for GCC/libstdc++ configure macro calls discovered in
# libstdc++-v3/configure.ac, acinclude.m4, linkage.m4, and crossconfig.m4.
#
# modeled: represented directly in the Bazel port.
# target-derived: selected from target/platform rules rather than a probe.
# build-setting-later: currently fixed/defaulted; keep as a future knob.
# not-needed: configure/build/install/testsuite plumbing replaced by Bazel.
# unsupported-feature: optional libstdc++ feature not built by this port today.
# unsupported-target: target family not supported by this libstdc++ port today.
# Optional third column: version condition for the currently supported GCC versions.
GCC_AC_THREAD_HEADER target-derived
GCC_AC_THREAD_MODEL target-derived gcc_ge_16
GCC_BASE_VER not-needed
GCC_CET_FLAGS unsupported-feature
GCC_CHECK_ASSEMBLER_HWCAP unsupported-target
GCC_CHECK_TLS modeled
GCC_CHECK_UNWIND_GETIPINFO modeled
GCC_LINUX_FUTEX modeled
GCC_NO_EXECUTABLES not-needed
GCC_PROG_GNU_CXXFILT unsupported-target
GCC_TRY_COMPILE_OR_LINK not-needed
GCC_WITH_TOOLEXECLIBDIR not-needed
GLIBCXX_CHECK_ALIGNAS_CACHELINE modeled gcc_ge_13_2
GLIBCXX_CHECK_ARC4RANDOM modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_C99_TR1 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_COMPILER_FEATURES modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_DEBUGGING modeled gcc_ge_16
GLIBCXX_CHECK_DEV_RANDOM modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_EXCEPTION_PTR_SYMVER modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_FILEBUF_NATIVE_HANDLES unsupported-target gcc_ge_14
GLIBCXX_CHECK_FILESYSTEM_DEPS modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_GETENTROPY modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_GETTIMEOFDAY modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_GET_NPROCS modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_GTHREADS modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_HOST target-derived
GLIBCXX_CHECK_INIT_PRIORITY modeled gcc_ge_13_2
GLIBCXX_CHECK_LFS modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_LINKER_FEATURES modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL_1 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL_2 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL_3 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECLS_AND_LINKAGES_1 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH11_PROTO modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECLS modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL_AND_LINKAGE_1 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL_AND_LINKAGE_2 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_DECL_AND_LINKAGE_3 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_MATH_SUPPORT modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_POLL modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_PTHREADS_NUM_PROCESSORS_NP modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_PTHREAD_COND_CLOCKWAIT modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_PTHREAD_MUTEX_CLOCKLOCK modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_PTHREAD_RWLOCK_CLOCKLOCK modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_SC_NPROCESSORS_ONLN modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_SC_NPROC_ONLN modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_SDT_H modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_SETRLIMIT not-needed
GLIBCXX_CHECK_SIZE_T_MANGLING modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_STDIO_LOCKING modeled gcc_ge_16
GLIBCXX_CHECK_STDIO_PROTO modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_STDLIB_DECL_AND_LINKAGE_1 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_STDLIB_DECL_AND_LINKAGE_2 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_STDLIB_DECL_AND_LINKAGE_3 modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_STDLIB_SUPPORT modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_SYSCTL_HW_NCPU unsupported-target
GLIBCXX_CHECK_S_ISREG_OR_S_IFREG modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_TEXT_ENCODING modeled gcc_ge_14
GLIBCXX_MAYBE_UNDERSCORED_FUNCS unsupported-target gcc_lt_14
GLIBCXX_CHECK_TMPNAM modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_UCHAR_H modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_WRITEV modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_X86_RDRAND modeled
GLIBCXX_CHECK_X86_RDSEED modeled
GLIBCXX_COMPUTE_STDIO_INTEGER_CONSTANTS modeled
GLIBCXX_CONDITIONAL not-needed
GLIBCXX_CONFIGURE not-needed
GLIBCXX_CONFIGURE_DOCBOOK not-needed
GLIBCXX_CONFIGURE_TESTSUITE not-needed
GLIBCXX_CROSSCONFIG unsupported-target
GLIBCXX_DEFAULT_ABI modeled
GLIBCXX_EMERGENCY_EH_ALLOC build-setting-later
GLIBCXX_ENABLE not-needed
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_ALLOCATOR modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_ATOMIC_BUILTINS modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_BACKTRACE unsupported-feature
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_C99 modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_CHEADERS target-derived
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_CLOCALE modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_CONCEPT_CHECKS build-setting-later
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_CSTDIO modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_CXX_FLAGS not-needed
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_DEBUG unsupported-feature
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_DEBUG_FLAGS unsupported-feature
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_DECIMAL_FLOAT modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_EXTERN_TEMPLATE modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_FILESYSTEM_TS modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_FLOAT128 build-setting-later
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_FULLY_DYNAMIC_STRING build-setting-later

GLIBCXX_ENABLE_PARALLEL unsupported-feature

GLIBCXX_ENABLE_PYTHON not-needed
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_SYMVERS modeled
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_THREADS target-derived
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_VERBOSE build-setting-later
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_VTABLE_VERIFY unsupported-feature
GLIBCXX_ENABLE_WCHAR_T modeled

GLIBCXX_EXPORT_FLAGS not-needed
GLIBCXX_EXPORT_INCLUDES not-needed
GLIBCXX_EXPORT_INSTALL_INFO not-needed
GLIBCXX_STRUCT_TM_TM_ZONE modeled gcc_ge_15
GLIBCXX_ZONEINFO_DIR modeled
